sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81725" key="peri/neusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περί-νευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n81725.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">oscillation, swing</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:178:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">178.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
